headline.text: L3 MF Matrix has been intermittently faulting since *09:26* — maintenance still troubleshooting at window close.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 ran S2 and S3 all shift. S2 belt C1 stopped three times overnight; scraper assembly found disassembled at 06:47 and fixed. S3 MM4 went down 07:00 to 09:00 on bursting pouches from worn gripper pads; maintenance replaced pads and adjusted settings, line running well by 09:54.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 ML3 load cells lost accuracy at 15:59, recalibrated and back online by 16:27. Urshel grinder wouldn't start at 16:42 due to a stuck lock, cleared in 19 minutes. Dark chocolate flush completed after new barrels arrived at 10:17.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 Cavanna wrapper has been problematic all shift — film sealing issues, jaws loose, product opening. Scott (Cavanna tech) on-site making adjustments; running better by 09:49 but still opening intermittently at window close. ML4 depositor 1 faulted overnight on leaky nozzles, pulled and cleaned; startup resumed at 06:22 after inclusion hopper was found off, depositing by 10:36. MF Matrix faulting on and off since 09:26, maintenance still troubleshooting.

notes.text: First batch of XR80 caramel cooked on S4 at 09:35 with Volker (Chocotech tech) on his last day on-site.
Bequet molds on-site; waiting on FW delivery to complete ML3 changeover testing.
ML4 TG4 lacks the correct printer and remains non-operational; bearing frame snapped during hopper adjustment but process still works, new part on order.

resolved.title: S3 MM4 bursting pouches due to worn gripper pads
resolved.summary: MM4 down 07:00 to 09:00 with 234 bags of scrap from bursting pouches caused by worn gripper pads and silver coating issue.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance replaced all gripper pads, adjusted sealer bar timing from 1.2 to 1.7, corrected fill station and guide rail, turned on hopper vibration, and added pouch tension; line running well by 09:54 — "MM4 is running good" (Nathan Topham).

resolved.title: S2 belt C1 stopped three times overnight
resolved.summary: Belt C1 stopped at 17:33, 22:54, and 02:05; scraper assembly found disassembled at 06:47 and reassembled.
resolved.resolution: Scraper assembly issue identified and resolved at 06:47 — "C1 scraper assembly found first thing this morning not assembled issue has been resolved" (Lolo Bencomo).

resolved.title: S2 metal detector rejecting repeatedly
resolved.summary: Metal detector went off more than three times in a row at 15:21; cards accepted without issues.
resolved.resolution: Sensitivity raised from 700 to 800 at 15:23 — "We raised the sensitivity from 700 to 800" (Caleb York).

resolved.title: ML3 load cells not reading accurately
resolved.summary: Load cell lost accuracy at 15:59, preventing line operation.
resolved.resolution: Load cells recalibrated, line started back up at 16:19 — "Line running again" (Molding Line 3 Pack, 16:27).

resolved.title: Urshel grinder would not turn on
resolved.summary: Grinder wouldn't start at 16:42 due to a safety lock stuck in the unlocked position.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance turned lock to locked position with vice grips, running at 17:01 — "Urshel is running now" (Mathew Draper).

resolved.title: New barrels needed for dark chocolate flush
resolved.summary: Requested new barrels from SV at 07:28 to flush dark chocolate from ML3 line, PTL at 74% and buffer tank at 40%.
resolved.resolution: New barrels arrived and staged at 10:17 — "New barrels have arrived & are being staged now" (Joey Michael Dudney).

resolved.title: FFS x-ray machine needed reset
resolved.summary: Line stopped at 09:47 because x-ray machine needed a reset.
resolved.resolution: Reset completed, line running at 09:49 — "The line is running" (VFFS).

resolved.title: ML4 inclusion hopper not heating
resolved.summary: Inclusion system heating unit not working at 08:08, team troubleshooting with WDS.
resolved.resolution: Hopper was not turned on; switched on at 08:44 — "The inclusion hopper was not turned on" (Rose Smuin).

resolved.title: ML1 Cavanna jaws too low, dropping good pieces
resolved.summary: Good chocolate pieces dropping after being cut at 15:27 due to jaws sitting too low.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance adjusted jaw height at 15:43 — "Maintenance adjusted where the jaws sat, they were too low" (Nathan Gevenois).

resolved.title: ML1 shakers 3 and 4 alarm triggered
resolved.summary: Alarm for shakers 3 and 4 triggered at 07:07, depositing stopped.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance adjusted shakers at 07:26 — "Maintenance adjusted the shakers" (Imperial).

resolved.title: MF Matrix 5 pallets assembled incorrectly
resolved.summary: 3rd shift built 5 pallets with mixed horizontal and vertical boxes, labels on both sides.
resolved.resolution: All 5 pallets organized correctly by 08:54 — "The 5 pallets were organized correctly" (Isis Oses).

resolved.title: ML1 sensor bracket bent on auger door
resolved.summary: Sensor for auger door wasn't registering closed at 15:35, bracket was bent.
resolved.resolution: Bracket straightened at 15:48 — "Bracket of the sensor on the door was bent causing it not to read correctly" (Nathan Gevenois).

resolved.title: Truffle melting tank in Chinese language
resolved.summary: Melting tank HMI switched to Chinese at 02:24, operator unable to navigate.
resolved.resolution: Frederick used AI to navigate menus and switch back to English at 02:24, then turned stirring on at 02:41 — "I was able to navigate to the correct screen and turn the stirring on" (Frederick Peairs).

resolved.title: MF Matrix rejecting high-weight pouches
resolved.summary: Line rejecting many pouches for high weight despite correct piece count at 07:48.
resolved.resolution: QA approved raising maximum weight limit to 211g at 07:48 — "QA has approved fix the maximum weight limit to 211 g" (Isis Oses).

needs_attention.title: S3 MM3 production time display issue
needs_attention.summary: Production time stuck at 05:42 and not updating during pouch check at 10:22; supervisor adjusted it to show real time.
needs_attention.status: Display corrected at 10:22, QA reviewing impact as of 10:46 — "message received, will review impact" (Charity Young).

needs_attention.title: ML2 craters on top of bars
needs_attention.summary: Still seeing craters on bars at 08:34; cooler temp reduced from 48F to 44F and shakers brought down.
needs_attention.status: Adjustments made at 08:34 and 08:44, no follow-up confirmation that craters resolved by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML1 Cavanna wrapper sealing issues ongoing
needs_attention.summary: Cavanna has had intermittent sealing and mechanical issues since 11:02; film opening, jaws loose, broken film. Scott (Cavanna tech) on-site all shift making adjustments.
needs_attention.status: Running better as of 09:49 after Scott installed temporary guides, but film still opening intermittently at window close. Scott continues adjustments.

needs_attention.title: MF Matrix faulting on perfect combination error
needs_attention.summary: Machine turning off by itself since 09:26 despite being full of product and no open buckets; reducing speed to 38 PPM did not resolve.
needs_attention.status: Line stopped again at 10:36, maintenance still on line troubleshooting at window close.
